school_admin.title: Messages
school_admin.summary: Use this page to compose and track official notices for teachers, students, and parents.
steps: Select audience scope first (all/class/subject).
Write a clear title and action-focused message.
Send and monitor unread/read trends.

school_admin.title: Teacher Assignments
school_admin.summary: Use this page to assign class teachers and subject teachers by term and academic year.
steps: Choose the teacher, class, subject, term, and academic year.
Use the class-subject list configured for the school.
Check current assignments below before adding a new one.

school_admin.title: Class Subjects
school_admin.summary: Use this page to configure subjects available for each secondary class such as JSS1, JSS3, SS1, SS2, and SS3.
steps: Pick the class name exactly.
Save core and elective subjects for that class.
Return to Teacher Assignments after saving subjects.

school_admin.title: School Settings
school_admin.summary: Use this page to edit school profile, term/year, grading, operation flags, and logo/signature uploads.
steps: Update term/year and school profile fields carefully.
Upload logo or principal signature where needed.
Save and refresh the dashboard to confirm changes.

school_admin.title: Timetable
school_admin.summary: Use this page to create or import class timetable rows and verify schedule conflicts.
steps: Select the class and period details.
Add or import rows in CSV format.
Check for clashes before finalizing.

school_admin.title: CBT Manager
school_admin.summary: Use this page to create CBT tests, add questions, publish, monitor attempts, and retrieve results.
steps: Choose class, subject, term, and academic year.
Create the test, then add questions and set status.
Open results/monitor once students start submitting.

school_admin.title: Add Students
school_admin.summary: Use this page to add students manually or through CSV into a specific class and term.
steps: Choose the class first.
Add names or import CSV rows.
Review the saved class student list below.

school_admin.title: Bulk Tools
school_admin.summary: Use this page for CSV import/export, backup, restore, and storage monitoring.
steps: Export a backup before bulk import operations.
Use dry-run mode first to validate file quality.
Use restore dry-run to verify backup integrity before applying.

teacher.title: Teacher Dashboard
teacher.summary: Use this page to manage score, attendance, messages, and assignment workflows for your current assignment scope.
steps: Confirm term/year and assigned class-subject scope.
Open the relevant task card (scores, attendance, or message).
Submit only actions that match your assignment scope.

teacher.title: Teacher CBT
teacher.summary: Use this page to create CBT tests and questions only for your assigned class and subject scope.
steps: Pick the assigned class and subject.
Create the test first, then add questions.
Publish only after questions are complete.

teacher.title: Attendance
teacher.summary: Use this page to mark attendance for your class-teacher scope only.
steps: Pick the class and instructional date.
Mark every student present, absent, or late.
Save and review the summary after submission.

teacher.title: Teacher Messages
teacher.summary: Use this page to read school notices and mark them as read.
steps: Read the latest notices first.
Use mark-read or mark-all-read when finished.
Open linked instructions if a notice asks for action.

teacher.title: Class List
teacher.summary: Use this page to view students in your class-teacher scope and students offering your assigned subjects.
steps: Check scope/status tags before taking any action.
Open score actions only for eligible students.
Use the list to identify pending score-entry work quickly.

teacher.title: Teacher Notifications
teacher.summary: Use this page to review missing-score alerts and pending-entry counts for your current scope.
steps: Review each alert row by class and subject.
Open Enter Scores and complete missing entries.
Return to confirm alert count has reduced.

teacher.title: Enter Scores
teacher.summary: Use this page to enter or update subject results for assigned classes only.
steps: Select class, subject, term, and year correctly.
Validate CA/exam entries before save.
Submit according to class-teacher/subject-teacher workflow.

parent.title: Parent Timetable
parent.summary: Use this page to view child-specific timetable rows filtered by class and offered subjects.
steps: Pick the child first when multiple children are linked.
Review only periods shown for that child's class/subjects.
Use print view if you need an offline copy.

student.title: View Result
student.summary: Use this page to review published term results, grades, and verification details.
steps: Confirm the selected term/year context.
Review subject rows and average carefully.
Use print/download where available.

student.title: Student Messages
student.summary: Use this page to review school notices and class/subject-specific messages.
steps: Open unread notices first.
Check assignment or deadline details.
Mark messages as read after reviewing.

super_admin.title: Error Logs
super_admin.summary: Use this page to monitor production/runtime errors across schools and roles.
steps: Filter by role, endpoint, or keyword.
Open details to inspect traceback and request context.
Use error UID when coordinating fixes.

super_admin.title: Assistant Analytics
super_admin.summary: Use this page to review assistant quality, unresolved questions, and role-specific patterns.
steps: Review repeated questions and low-confidence topics.
Update app guidance for frequent unresolved workflows.
Use the patterns to improve page help and KB entries.
